arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea handed Xavi Simons transfer update as new RB Leipzig 'stance' emerges
arts.sum: The report claims that Simons is valued at around €80million (£68.5million) going into the summer transfer window, but the Bundesliga club are yet to receive any official offers for the playmaker. RB Leipzig have reportedly named their asking price for playmaker Xavi Simons this summer, amid reported interest from Arsenal and Chelsea .

arts.ttl: How Arsenal aim to learn US lessons for Emirates to aid Mikel Arteta and Andrea Berta plans
arts.sum: “While in North America it is obviously important to grow your brands and to grow your teams, certainly in the Premier League, the more revenue you can drive does affect the product that you can put on the pitch,” Demoff said. The company also has extensive real estate attached to their sporting assets such as the Gunners’ Emirates Stadium home, the So-Fi Stadium where the LA Rams play, and the Nuggets’ Ball Arena home.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery gives Arsenal Ollie Watkins transfer green light after £40m move
arts.sum: It’s no secret that Arsenal will be one of the teams searching for a striker in the upcoming summer transfer window. Rashford was again preferred to the former Brentford man, with Watkins playing the final 14 minutes of the game.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta told to make huge Arsenal change for PSG Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: Former Premier League goalkeeper Ben Foster has expressed his doubts over whether Mikel Arteta should allow Bukayo Saka to take penalties, following the winger's miss against Real Madrid. "If I'm one of those other Arsenal players, I'm going up to him after that penalty and going, 'Get your head in the game, k***head, don't do silly s*** like this!'...
